summary.name: PEP
summary.oneLiner: A vibrant, premium protein drink that earns its place on the table when everyone else is drinking — social ritual, no alcohol required.
summary.positioningStatement: For social, aesthetic-driven people who want a drink worth ordering when they are out — something that looks the part, tastes memorable, and replaces both the sugary soft drink and the fifth round of drinks — PEP is the premium non-alcoholic option that makes every social moment feel like a proper occasion.
